check.name: simulation_first_path
check.evidence: Isaac Lab is identified as the HPP simulation curriculum layer before physical actuation.

check.name: no_direct_motor_command_path
check.evidence: The intake requires HPP to stay above Isaac ROS/cuMotion and begin with telemetry-only bridges.

check.name: telemetry_schema
check.evidence: The robotics adapter has a synthetic telemetry schema; NVIDIA ROS topic mappings are not implemented yet.

check.name: sentinel_stop_mapping
check.evidence: The robotics adapter maps instability, joint error, unknown state, and low power to protective actions.

check.name: operator_override_mapping
check.evidence: Operator override routes to operator_control with Sentinel required.

check.name: hardware_cutoff_plan
check.evidence: The intake requires a low-power supervised actuator bench with hardware cutoff, but no bench wiring exists yet.

check.name: replayable_trajectory_logging
check.evidence: The HPP eval harness writes JSONL trajectories for robotics_adapter_safety.

check.name: jetson_target_notes
check.evidence: The intake places Jetson Orin/Thor as the robot-edge inference and telemetry target.

check.name: tensorrt_inference_notes
check.evidence: The intake identifies TensorRT as the optimized deployment path for ONNX/TensorRT engines on NVIDIA GPUs and Jetson.

check.name: license_and_dependency_boundary
check.evidence: The intake separates OSS repos from Isaac Sim/proprietary dependency review and avoids vendoring code.
